sentences.text: Is Suzanne? I didn't figure I'd catch you here before the holiday weekend. This is Jordan copa for our principal. I'm I shot you an email. Hopefully we can find a couple of minutes to talk next week. I was pointed in your direction regarding marketing. So, I know super phone

Thank you for calling. I know for management and in good company. If you know your party's extension dial. It at any time press three for a dial by name directory or press zero for the receptionist using the keypad on your phone. Please enter the last name of the party you wish to reach. Press the number one, when you hear the name of the party you wish to contact for Suzanne Monday, please hold while we transfer you to Suzanne Monday. If you remain on hold we will try to connect you or you can press any key to leave a message. Hi, you've reached the desk of Susan Vandyke accounts payable collection specialist. If you have reached this please leave your name your phone number the community that you moved at and your move out, date and I will contact you as soon as possible again the best way to reach me is through email at a M C C a R E S at I G C R E dot. Com and again that is all lower case a M C cares at I G C R E dot. Com. Thank you for calling bye bye.
call, but I promise it won't be as bad as it sounds. I hope we can talk three one seven seven two zero three two six six give me a call when you can.
